title: Hextech: Anomaly
description: A completely sane minecraft tech mod
body:
# A Minecraft tech mod, revolving around echoes


## Blocks:

**- Cable Connector:** Connects the mod blocks to their energy source, also emits light, and when left out in the open, conducts electricity.

**- Hextech Mesh:** The mod's main source of energy. They also connect to each other.

**- Hextech Teleporter:** Connect to meshes in order for it to work. When given a redstone signal, it will teleport to the landing pad selected in the teleporter terminal. The more meshes you connect to it, the further you can go.

**- Teleporter Terminal:** Right-click to open UI. You can give xyz coordinates there, or you can right-click a landing pad with the teleporter linker, then shift-click the terminal to automatically bind it. You can select the active pad by clicking at the coordinates.

**- Landing Pad:** Write the placed pad's coordinates into the teleporter terminal.

**- Hextech Spire:** Give it hextech meshes to determine level (1-3). Give it an active redstone signal to start the targeting. The spire will target any entity (except the owner and passive mobs) and deal 4 hearts of magic damage per shot.

**- Reinforced Redstone:** Blast-proof redstone block.


## Items:

**- Echolocator:** Right-click to reveal nearby entities. Points towards the nearest landing pad.

**- Echo Relocator:** Shift-click the landing pad to bind. Right-click again to return to the landing pad.

**- Copper Wrench:** Shift-right-click the mod's blocks to instantly pick them up.

**- Spire Mark:** Right-click the spire to bind (Max 32). Players who have the spire mark in their inventory will not be attacked by those spires. When held in off hand with an empty mark in main hand, it copies the marks from the offhand one to the mainhand one.

**- Teleporter Linker:** Right-click the landing pad to bind. Shift-right-click any terminal to add the landing pad to it.

**- Hextech Crystal:** Unstable element, handle carefully. Crafting material.

**- Hextech Gemstone:** A more stable variation of the crystal. Crafting material.

**- Echo nugget:** Crafting material.

**- Arcane Anomaly:** Obtained by blowing up an Arcane Anomaly. You overused your enchanting table again, didn't you?

**- Overcharged Anomaly:** Crafted with an Arcane Anomaly, when placed it starts a 20-second fuse, then explodes with devastating power.

**- Runeforged Crown:** Helmet, if the user gets below 4 hearts, the crown unleashes a shockwave, damaging and throwing any entity in a 16-block radius.

**- Hextech Repeater:** Crossbow, loaded by right clicking with anything. When charged it will not consume the ammo put into it.



## Enchantments:

**- Slaughter:** When put on a Copper wrench or any pickaxe, the wrench deals additional damage against players with better armor. Treasure enchant, obtainable in Ancient City chests, and Stronghold Library chests

**- Cold-Blooded:** Crown enchant, negates all fire damage

**- Sturdy:** Crown enchant, negates all explosion damage

**- Apotropaic:** Crown enchant, negates all magic damage, and reflects back 80% of it

**- Rapid:** Repeater enchant, allows shooting flaming projectiles without cooldown

**- Discharge:** Allows loading of the mod's blocks:
- > Landing Pad: When shot at an entity it teleports them to the user
- > Hextech Teleporter: When shot it teleports the user
- > Hextech Crystal: When shot it explodes on contact with ground
- > Hextech Gemstone: When shot, it creates piercing laser damaging enemies
- > Arcane Anomaly: When shot it creates a vortex of particles pulling everything inside of it
- > Overcharged Anomaly: When loaded it gives the user glowing and a 1-minute window to shoot it, otherwise they die. When shot it explodes with devastating power, one-shotting anything and destroying blocks


The mod was heavily inspired by _Arcane: League of Legends_.

**Originally made for the MABCSMP**
